horoscope: Transits early today help smooth over conversations, dear Aries, and you might receive good feedback, news, or reviews. Receiving new information that helps you and your goals along can be in pleasant focus. Your strength shines through your communications. As the day advances, transits encourage a fresh look at your friendships or goals. A connection or project can reinvigorate you. You may want to bond and connect with others on a deeper level than usual, and conversations tend to reflect this. You get your message across powerfully. Old habits related to learning, communicating, and friendships that are no longer working seem glaring today. News can come that leaves you feeling you have an advantage.

Transits soften the edges of early day, dear Taurus, giving you a window into your subconscious mind. Even in small doses, private time enables you to tap into your intuition. The day can be great for making inner changes as your values and interests evolve. Socially, because you can read others’ intentions and motivations or feelings so well, relationships can get a boost. It’s also a good time for money management initiatives and business matters that require imagination and intuition. As the day advances, you can come up with some satisfying conclusions or strategies. You might get the chance to put a problem behind you, or you can make excellent progress on a career or money-making idea. It’s a good time to explore different ways to build your self-esteem or increase your earning potential.

Combining the practical and imaginative comes naturally to you today, dear Gemini. Your more easygoing and likable qualities are in the spotlight! More than usual, others appreciate your insight, and you can inspire or gather inspiration from your friends and connections. You can be incredibly resourceful today, and connecting with someone on a mental level can be satisfying. A relationship can benefit from a mutually beneficial agreement or compromise. It’s an excellent time to gain different perspectives on a matter or expand your knowledge, and it feels empowering to learn and grow as you do. Romantically speaking, this can be an unusually intuitive and possibly even magical day of increased understanding. A trine between Mercury in your sign and perceptive Pluto can help resolve a problem or improve a relationship bond.

Ideally, you can get to a place of greater understanding of your past and your deeper feelings about recent events today, dear Cancer. Opening your mind to possibilities helps you now—your insight into business, career, or reputation matters is second to none. Support for career or public efforts can come from behind the scenes. You can also feel some excitement about sharing your goals with someone. Transits today are good for getting a handle on things! You might enjoy a new subject or research a topic more deeply. You’re more persuasive, and resolving problems through conversation can be incredibly successful. A mental breakthrough is possible, and sudden memories or deeper thinking can lead you to exciting places. Discussions are meaningful or more thought-provoking fare than usual. As well, your musings are notable, breaking new ground.

Transits are strong for smoothing rough edges today, dear Leo. You communicate more creatively with friends or networks, and you enjoy tapping into a feeling of acceptance. As you do, your thoughts or words flow more naturally and are more compassionate. What and how you communicate can encourage others to open up, and you might inspire and help someone out. There can be a breakthrough in your spiritual understanding today. Certainly, it can be satisfying to build bridges. New visions of your future can motivate and inspire you today, despite minor interruptions. It’s a fine time to sort out problems, and some real food for thought can emerge today. On another level, you might better understand your goals and ambitions, particularly related to your relationships. Making meaningful changes and mental associations comes more naturally as you see your connections and plans in a new light.

You’re likely to gain valuable insights into important people in your life as well as your ambitions or goals today, dear Virgo. Tapping into your intuition can be a wonderful experience now, but making plans for finances, business deals, and problem-solving are all favored now. Sensitive topics can be handled with more ease than usual today, and you could find that work-related matters run especially well. You might gain an advantage over a competitor in business, or more simply, gain new insight into your goals. With Mercury at the top of your chart these days, you are rarely short of ideas related to business and long-range, life-path goals. Today, filtering them works well. You have a good head for practical matters, but you also do a lot of reading between the lines, which helps you understand both situations and people in your life.

Conversations, musings, and thoughts can help you heal today, dear Libra, as can writing. Today is strong for generating new ideas and putting faith in your long-term plans. Allowing your thoughts to flow without pressure puts you in a relaxed state that will get you better results early today. Your relationships get a boost when you understand where others are coming from. As the day advances, transits help you focus on what matters. At the same time, you’re inclined to gently push the limits with creativity, feeling, and topics of discussion. Mental energy and strength are in good supply, and your powers to persuade and take the lead are substantial. You have an eye for good deals and investments, or you may feel passionate about an idea, cause, study, or creative project. Positive or exciting news might arrive now. You’re looking for intensity today, and it can be an excellent time to get in touch with your feelings.

Open-hearted conversations or healing thoughts can figure strongly today, dear Scorpio. Your willingness to change is endearing you to others, and it’s easier to put everything together and get a fuller picture. A financial boost is also possible. With a clearer sense of your priorities, you might gain an advantage or feel more empowered in a home, financial, or intimate situation. You might strike up a conversation about a private or personal matter and sort things out, and you appreciate that all parties are mentally present! It can be satisfying to get to the bottom line. Seeing all of the layers of a situation helps your overall understanding of a problem or person, and a conversation can be highly revealing. It can also be a day to feel motivated to do things you’ve put aside.

Connecting with others can bring unexpected opportunities today, dear Sagittarius. People support your ideas and enjoy your stories and insights. You are especially in touch with your creativity. As you tune into the subtleties, relationship matters thrive. Others enjoy your insights, and it’s a wonderful time for artistic pursuits, whether you’re enjoying others’ work or creating something yourself. There can be new levels reached with people in your life today, particularly through meaningful insights and conversations. You have the power of persuasion and strong observation skills on your side. Right now, great ideas tend to emerge from your interactions with a partner or trusted friend. Certainly, negotiations can be very successful and beneficial. Excellent energy is with you for matters of the mind, and increased clarity can come through or about a partnership today.

Today’s transits offer a sense of harmony and agreement to your everyday affairs or health, dear Capricorn. Conversations seem to flow beautifully. It’s an excellent time to seek or gravitate to new projects or topics that inspire you. Tapping into this energy can lead to real mental refreshment, doing wonders for you. Good energy is with you for solving problems or rising above them when it comes to practical matters, especially as the day advances. There is bound to be quite a bit of relief after uncluttering your mind and conscience. You’re ready to invest more energy and faith into an idea. With a patient approach, you can make empowering improvements to your daily routines and self-care programs.

Recreation, entertainment, hobbies, and art or music can figure strongly and help relax and inspire you early today, dear Aquarius. You can feel inspired to communicate with more style, color, or sensitivity. There can be benefits to your business or projects through word of mouth, or good reviews provide a boost. You find it easier to let go of frustrations, and with less pressure, your thinking is more intuitive. As the day advances, it's a strong time for friendships and dating, personal attraction, communications, and social life in general, especially when it comes to cultivating and enhancing connections through conversation. You can also be quite enthused about a hobby or creative pursuit now. There can be a strong urge to express yourself in a creative, unique manner that grabs hold today.

This can be a good time to express your thoughts and feelings with more imagination, dear Pisces. Fun, inspiring, or understanding conversations with people you care about can figure strongly now. Letting go of the pressure to concentrate has a nice effect on you early today, allowing you to see the bigger picture. Sharing ideas or plans with family might be rewarding now. Still, as the day advances, a Mercury-Pluto aspect is powerful for gaining new insight into your motivations and desires. Conversations can quickly turn intimate, deep, or meaningful. You might uncover exciting information that changes your thinking in powerful ways. There can be vivid memories and important discoveries. Look for ways to make constructive changes rather than random ones.
